creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to uffe from comment #4)
> Hi,
> 
> If it is ok with you I'll pick some of your changes - and incorporate them
> into nullmailer over time.
> But for now I think that the dust needs to settle a bit because I'd had lots
> of angry users complaining over the recent problems with nullmailer. I was
> not notified of the faulty change - and hence did not have a change to
> review it.
> It took a week before i discovered that someone had changes in the port that
> I maintain... hmm

Of course, take parts that you like whenever it best fits for you.
Your port is not broken, so no need to fix or change anything. I'd vote that any change has to be discussed with the port's maintainer, at least if the patch doesn't protect from damage – that could be an exception.

Thanks,

-Harry
